name: Gingerbread Men
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly cream shortening, sugar, and salt together.
2. Stir in the egg, molasses, and vinegar until well combined.
3. Sift dry ingredients; gradually stir into the molasses mixture.
4. Chill about 2 hours.
5. On a lightly floured surface, roll dough to an 1/8-inch thickness.
6. Cut with a cookie cutter.
7. Place cutouts 1 inch apart on a greased baking sheet.
8. Use raisins to make eyes and buttons.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 6 minutes.
10. Cool slightly, then remove from the sheet.
11. Allow cookies to finish cooling on wire racks.
12. Store in a tightly covered tin. Keeps well for 3-4 weeks.
Note: I use a 4-inch cutter. For smaller men, you may need to reduce baking time by about 1 minute.
